intro: Dracaena brevifolia, commonly known as the dragon tree, is a species of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The health benefits of Dracaena brevifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include dragon's blood resin, which contains tannins and other polyphenolic compounds, as well as flavonoids and terpenoids.
